de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Interface TypeScope

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, CompilationUnit, ContextStatementBlock, EnumClassDeclaration, InterfaceDeclaration, StatementBlock, SuperArrayDeclaration, Switch, TypeDeclaration

    public interface TypeScope
extends ScopeDefiningElement
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for types. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.NonTerminalProgramElement

        getChildAt, getChildCount

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ProgramElement

        getComments, match

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SourceElement

        equalsModRenaming, getEndPosition, getFirstElement, getFirstElementIncludingBlocks, getLastElement, getPositionInfo, getRelativePosition, getStartPosition, prettyPrint, visit
